div.p: Implementation-grade transition from Real/Protected mode to Paged Segmentation.
Map [0x0 → 0x400000] Ensures EIP remains valid immediately after CR0.PG set.
EIP=0x100500 MMU translates via PD[0] PTE entry is 0x0 (P=0) CR2 loaded with 0x100500

ol.li: Write-Protection: If CR0.WP=1, Supervisor cannot write to RO pages.
Pre-fetch: CPU pre-fetches next instructions; failure occurs if next instr isn't mapped.
G-Bit: Global bit ignored if CR4.PGE=0.
